title: Pass Result
description: Traceability record for a single executed reasoning pass. Usable standalone or embedded inside a pass_chain_record.

pass_id.description: Unique identifier for this pass execution.

pass_order.description: 1-based position of this pass in the chain sequence.

prompt_id.description: Identifier of the prompt used for this pass.

prompt_version.description: Pinned prompt version used. Null only if version pinning is not yet available for this prompt.

model_name.description: Specific model name or version identifier.

input_refs.description: References to upstream pass IDs or artifact IDs that served as inputs to this pass.

output_ref.description: Reference to the artifact or internal record handle for this pass output. Null if the pass failed before producing output.

schema_validation.description: Result of schema validation applied to the pass output.

schema_id.description: Identifier of the schema used for validation.

errors.description: List of validation error messages. Empty when status is 'passed' or 'skipped'.

confidence_method.description: Method used to derive the confidence score. Reasoning-class passes must use 'scoring_pass'.

confidence_score.description: Confidence score in [0, 1]. Null if confidence could not be determined.

scoring_pass_ref.description: pass_id of the scoring sub-pass that produced this confidence score. Required when confidence_method is 'scoring_pass'.

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock execution time in milliseconds. Null if the pass did not complete.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings raised during this pass execution.

started_at.description: Timestamp when this pass began execution.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when this pass completed or failed. Null if still in progress.
